judgment.summary: A growth-oriented company with strong gross margins but currently loss-making on an operating and net basis, carrying significant debt.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter missed EPS estimates by a wide margin; next earnings date is 2026-08-10.
positives: Forward P/E of 17.91 suggests reasonable valuation relative to future earnings expectations.
Gross margin of 72.9% indicates strong pricing power and efficient cost of goods sold.
Free cash flow of $174.31M TTM shows the company is generating cash from operations.
Total cash of $750.88M provides a cushion for operations and debt servicing.
negatives: Operating margin of -7.9% and profit margin of -0.6% indicate the business is not yet profitable.
Debt/Equity ratio of 253.72 is very high, suggesting significant financial leverage and risk.
Analyst growth estimates for the current quarter (-54.5%) and fiscal year (-15.3%) are negative.
Last quarter's EPS surprise of -1267.9% indicates a significant miss on earnings expectations.

news.paragraph: HIMS & Hers Health, Inc. is currently trading at $23.04, with recent headlines dominated by routine "Most Active Stocks" reports. There are no significant catalysts or directional news events immediately apparent from the provided headlines. The upcoming earnings date on August 10th will be a key event to watch for any shifts in sentiment or guidance.
